title: Natural Advice
learningGoal: Speak fluently using phrasal verbs (with correct pronoun placement) and idioms to give advice.
instructions: 同僚が仕事で困っています。句動詞やイディオムを使って、彼にアドバイスをしてあげましょう。代名詞（it）の位置に注意して、マイクに向かって話してください。(Your colleague is having trouble at work. Use phrasal verbs and idioms to give him advice. Pay attention to pronoun placement.)
speakingPrompt: Give advice using 'turn it off', 'piece of cake', and 'don't give up'.
scenario: A colleague's computer is broken and he is frustrated.

subTasks.prompt: Your colleague says: 'My computer froze!' Tell him to turn it off. (Please turn it off.)

sampleResponse.transliteration: プリーズ ターン イット オフ。
sampleResponse.baseTranslation: 電源を切ってください。

subTasks.prompt: He says: 'I can't fix it. It's too hard.' Tell him it is very easy. (It is a piece of cake.)

sampleResponse.targetText: It is a piece of cake.
sampleResponse.transliteration: イット イズ ア ピース オヴ ケイク。
sampleResponse.baseTranslation: とても簡単ですよ（朝飯前です）。

subTasks.prompt: He says: 'I want to quit.' Tell him not to give up. (Please don't give up.)

sampleResponse.transliteration: プリーズ ドント ギヴ アップ。
sampleResponse.baseTranslation: あきらめないでください。

scenarioContext.targetText: Help your colleague fix his computer and encourage him.
scenarioContext.transliteration: ヘルプ ユア コリーグ フィックス ヒズ コンピューター アンド エンカレッジ ヒム。
scenarioContext.baseTranslation: 同僚がパソコンを直すのを手伝い、励ましてあげてください。

baselineTranscriptSentences.transliteration: プリーズ ターン イット オフ。
baselineTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: 電源を切ってください。

baselineTranscriptSentences.targetText: It is a piece of cake.
baselineTranscriptSentences.transliteration: イット イズ ア ピース オヴ ケイク。
baselineTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: とても簡単ですよ（朝飯前です）。

baselineTranscriptSentences.transliteration: プリーズ ドント ギヴ アップ。
baselineTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: あきらめないでください。

expectedSpeakingPoints: Using pronoun correctly: turn IT off.
acceptableParaphrases: Turn it off. It's a piece of cake. Don't give up.

criteria.name: Pronoun Placement
criteria.description: Must put 'it' in the middle of 'turn off'.

adminCorrectAnswerSet.sampleAnswer: Please turn it off. It is a piece of cake. Please don't give up.

feedbackRules.onPass: Great job! You sound very natural. Your pronunciation of 'turn it off' was excellent.
feedbackRules.onFail: Please try again. Did you say 'turn off it'? The correct way is 'turn IT off'.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good effort! Practice linking the sounds together so 'piece of' sounds like 'peesuv'.

audioAssets.audioTranscript: Please turn it off. It is a piece of cake. Please don't give up.

hintText: Make sure to say 'turn IT off'. Don't put 'it' at the end.
